title: Plank gas
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Plank gas''' was an extremely corrosive chemical which ate away at exposed skin,<ref name="MB">[[Star Wars Miniatures Battles (first edition)|''Star Wars Miniatures Battles'', First Edition]]</ref> causing painful injuries. The chemical could also destroy non-organic material, such as [[Environment suit/Legends|space suits]], electronic components, [[Droid/Legends|droids]],<ref name="EGWT">''[[The Essential Guide to Weapons and Technology]]''</ref> and defensive structures.<ref name="NEGWT">''[[The New Essential Guide to Weapons and Technology]]''</ref> Due to its corrosive nature, [[Breath mask/Legends|breath masks]] were useless against plank gas.<ref name="MB" /> The [[Imperial Military/Legends|Imperial Military]] loaded [[Plank gas grenade|speciality]] grenades with plank gas for use with the [[CSPL-12 projectile launcher/Legends|CSPL-12]] [[Projectile launcher/Legends|projectile launcher]].<ref name="ISB">''[[Imperial Sourcebook]]''</ref>
